standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to spoken English in basic and simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التفاعل مع اللغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في عروض قصيرة بسيطة وتعليمات وأسئلة ومحادثات موجهة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Interact with spoken English in short, simple presentations, instructions, questions and guided conversations
indicators: Follow instructions in activities and games
Identify two or more key ideas in an oral presentation or conversation
Respond to questions before, during and after listening
Locate needed information while listening
Respond to oral presentation, instructions or conversations using simple questions or statements
Participate in a variety of short simple dialogues
Express opinions after listening to a(n) (audio) text
Detect sequence of events in a simple story
Identify main ideas and specific details in descriptions of people, places, and past, present and future events
Use textbook illustrations and pictionaries to
Use new words when listening
Use teacher introduction to understand new words when listening
Ask and answer questions in order to seek help, get information or clarify something that is not understood in the oral texts under discussion
Show engagement and care when listening to others

standards.nameAr: تطوير استراتيجيات المحادثة باستخدام التنغيم والنبر والتوقف الصحيح
standards.nameEn: Develop speaking strategies using correct intonation, stress and pauses

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تعزيز القدرة على النطق الصحيح لحروف العلة والحروف الساكنة النهائية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Consolidate the ability to correctly pronounce vowels and final consonants
indicators: Accurately pronounce the third-person-singular -(e)s in simple present (/s/, /z/, /Iz/) and the past -ed (/d/, /t/, /Id/)
Accurately pronounce simple vowels and diphthongs

standards.nameAr: التحدث للتواصل والتفاعل الفعال باستخدام مجموعة من التراكيب المتعلمة
standards.nameEn: Speak to effectively communicate and interact using a range of learned structures

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التواصل بمجموعة متنوعة من الأفكار البسيطة والمشاركة في الحوارات
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Communicate a variety of simple ideas and participate in dialogues
indicators: Modify actions using adverbs
Describe and compare objects, people and incidents using comparative and superlative forms
Link sentences using conjunctions (or, so, because, when)
Express the future using going to and will in positive and negative statements and questions
Talk about needs and wants
Convey obligation, permission and suggestions, with had to, may, should, shouldn't and would
Use the simple present, simple past, present progressive and simple future to answer questions and/or produce statements in student dialogues

standards.nameAr: القراءة لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من السرد الواقعي والنصوص المعلوماتية والأدبية
standards.nameEn: Read to understand a variety of factual recounts, and informational and literary texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات القراءة لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من النصوص الواقعية البسيطة والمعلوماتية والأدبية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop reading strategies to understand a variety of simple factual, informational and literary texts
indicators: Use pictures and contextual clues to guess the meaning of unfamiliar words and to make predictions about the content of a reading text
Ask and answer questions to help determine or clarify the meaning of words/phrases in context
Use illustrations and key details in a text to determine its main idea(s)
Independently read longer texts (up to two pages)
Identify and use various text features (e.g., title, headings) to locate key facts or information in a text

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار فهم السرد الواقعي البسيط والنصوص المعلوماتية والأدبية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate understanding of simple factual recounts and informational and literary texts
indicators: Read silently first to understand the main idea and then loudly to show their understanding of the text
Recognize and name some basic types of reading materials (e.g., story, poem, postcard, letter)
Identify the topic and main idea(s) of simple reading materials
Identify main characters, settings and major events in a short simple narrative using key details
Retell short pictorial stories read for pleasure

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة لمجموعة متنوعة من السرد الواقعي والنصوص المعلوماتية والأدبية
standards.nameEn: Respond to a variety of factual recounts, and informational and literary texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إجراء روابط بين المعرفة السابقة والتجارب والنصوص
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Make connections between prior knowledge and experiences and simple factual recounts, and informational and literary texts
indicators: Express opinions on characters, events and information in a reading text
Discuss causes of certain events in a reading text
Identify and discuss new ideas and vocabulary items in a text
Identify the gist of the whole text regardless of any difficult words
Discuss the text using clues and referring to certain sentences, phrases or words
Identify words and phrases in a story that express feelings or emotions

standards.nameAr: تأليف نصوص قصيرة بسيطة من 4-6 جمل عن الناس والأماكن أو الأحداث
standards.nameEn: Compose short, simple texts of 4-6 sentences about people, places or events

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: كتابة نصوص وظيفية قصيرة (رسائل، بريد إلكتروني، قوائم، تذكيرات)
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Write short, functional texts (messages, emails, lists, reminders)
indicators: Write correct sentences
Write a short, simple text in the past, present or future tense
Appropriately punctuate short texts devoid of punctuation marks
Write short texts that serve a purpose such as messages, emails, lists and reminders

standards.nameAr: عرض لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من النصوص المرئية
standards.nameEn: View to understand a variety of visual texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التعرف على أن موارد النص المرئي يمكن أن توفر معلومات واقعية وتزيد الفهم
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Recognize that visual text resources can provide factual information and increase understanding
indicators: Attend to visual information showing understanding through discussion, role play and illustrations
Realize that shapes, symbols and colors have meaning and include them in presentations
Realize that visual information reflects and contributes to the understanding of context
View a range of visual language formats (film/video, posters, drama) and discuss their effectiveness
Observe and discuss familiar and unfamiliar visual messages and make judgments about effectiveness
Discuss personal experiences that relate to visual images
Use actions and body language to reinforce and add meaning to oral presentations
Deliver short oral presentations to peers
